title: gelasia lanata
intro: Gelasia lanata, also known as woolly gelasia, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gelasia lanata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Gelasia lanata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
